subcodes.first_line: O thou firm in the Covenant! Thy letter addressed to his honor Mirza Hayder Aly
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ای که بجناب آقا میرزا حیدر علی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom
